DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Apr-09-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Michael Maloney, Esq (916-333-3613) of Louis White P.C. for Plaintiff Angela Tickler appearing through Court Call.
Sasan Mirkarimi, Esq (858-342-1894) of Mirk Law Group PLC for Defendant and moving party Residential Credit Solutions appearing through Court Call.
Sharon L. Stewart Esg (415-675-3517) of Bryan Cave for Defendant Bank of New York Mellon and Bank of America & Reconstruct.

Hearing is held. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows: DEFENDANT RESIDENTIAL CREDIT SOLUTIONS, INC's DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT is sustained without leave to amend on all causes of action. The Demurrer is sustained with leave to amend as to the fraud cause of action re: Reinstatement quote. Prevailing party to submit order in compliance with CRC 3.1312. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D501)

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jan-17-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No Appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT THE BANK OF NEW YORK MELLON FKA THE BANK OF NEW and BANK OF AMERICA, N.A., RECONTRUST COMPANY, N.A.'s DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is Sustained with leave to amend: (1) to allege fraud with requisite particularity as to modification process; (2) to allege duty, i.e. facts showing that defendant acted outside the scope of conventional money lending; (3) to allege outrageous conduct and severe emotional distress; (4) to allege actionable violations of 2924 and tender. Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk J. Rumsey, Not Reported. (501)
